name: Partyhat Productions
description: Lead server developer for the Masayoshi Games Twitch Rivals event, reaching 50k+ concurrent viewers across 100+ creators with live broadcast integration.

projects.name: Masayoshi Games
projects.description: A 64-player Hunger Games Twitch Rivals event, live-streamed with 100+ creators to 50k+ concurrent viewers. Players compete in an unfamiliar world filled with "The Roots", defeating infested monsters and uncovering rare loot. Integrated with GeekLounge to report real-time game metrics from the server to their broadcast overlay system. Originally built on Minestom for performance, then ported to PaperMC under tight deadlines when scope expanded to require more vanilla Minecraft features.

projects.name: MC Party
projects.description: A minigame network, built with a "Mario Party"-esc twist. Focused on fast-paced, fun, and competitive gameplay.
